app.name: newnZip
hero.title:
Drop archives.
Ship results.
hero.body: KEKA-inspired flow with native engine routing, destination presets, and a clean extraction queue.
dialog.choose_archives.title: Choose Archives
dialog.choose_output.title: Choose Output Folder
dialog.choose_create_files.title: Choose Files to Archive
dialog.choose_create_folder.title: Choose Folder to Archive
dialog.info.title: newnZip
dialog.info.add_required: Add at least one archive to the queue.
dialog.info.no_pending: There are no pending jobs to extract.
dialog.warn.output_missing: Output folder does not exist yet.
log.no_engines: No native engines detected. Python fallback will cover ZIP/TAR only.
hint.platform.windows: Run scripts/register_windows.ps1 as Administrator to register context menus and file associations.
hint.platform.macos: Bundle the app, then run scripts/register_macos.sh to refresh Launch Services hints.
hint.platform.other: Desktop shell integration is currently provided for macOS and Windows.
extract.no_engine: No compatible native extractor found for this format. Install 7-Zip/7zz, unar, unzip, or tar.
create.success_split: Created split archive at {path} with {size} MB volumes
create.error.no_sources: Choose at least one file or folder to archive.
create.error.sevenzip_required: 7z or 7zz is required to create 7z archives.
create.error.native_engine_missing: The newnZip native ZIP engine is not available.
create.error.invalid_split: Split size must be a positive number.
create.error.tar_split: tar.gz split creation is not supported. Use zip or 7z.
simple.top_hint: Drop an archive to extract. Drop files or folders to compress.
simple.compress_subtitle: Creates a {format} archive next to the dropped item.
simple.extract_subtitle: Extracts archives into a folder beside the archive.
simple.status_failed: The last task failed. Check the log below.
simple.mixed_drop_error: Do not mix archive files with normal files in the same drop.
simple.no_output: There is no recent output to reveal.
simple.single_drop_title: Drop files, folders, or archives here
simple.single_drop_subtitle: Archives are extracted. Files and folders are compressed as {format}.
picker.title: Choose files or folders
picker.message: Selecting archives extracts them, and selecting files or folders compresses them.
settings.title: Settings
conflict.ask_title: An archive with this name already exists.
conflict.ask_message: Add a copy or overwrite the existing file.
